desired_capability: Create a prompt-only local Codex skill that guides workers to produce SkillFoundry packages that pass strict product gates with explicit refs, local distribution, and no private material leakage.
target_user: local Codex user packaging reusable skills
triggers: When a skill package must survive product-grade validation.
non_triggers: When a quick draft without product boundaries is acceptable.
must: Emphasize product-grade validation and local verification.
Keep prompt-only mode free of runtime assets and data assets.
Write all generated files under package/.
must_not: Do not include raw conversation text, provider payloads, credentials, or secrets.
